title: Hybrid Search — BM25 + Vectors, Fused with RRF
tagline: Watch a keyword ranker and a semantic ranker disagree on the same query, then fuse them with Reciprocal Rank Fusion into a list that is rarely wrong on either — 100% in your browser, no API key.
description: In-browser hybrid search: BM25 + MiniLM vectors fused with Reciprocal Rank Fusion, all client-side.
